mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_group_members (group_id, user_id, role) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{role})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM im_group_members WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM im_group_members WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT role FROM im_group_members WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE im_group_members SET role = #{role} WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT group_id, user_id, role, joined_at FROM im_group_members WHERE group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY joined_at
